name: AI Proposal & Invoice Autopilot v3 — Enhanced

parameters.formDescription: Fill in the client details. A personalised proposal + invoice will be generated and emailed automatically within 30 seconds.

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ model: 'gpt-4o', temperature: 0.72, max_tokens: 4000, messages: [{ role: 'system', content: $json.systemPrompt }, { role: 'user', content: $json.userPrompt }] }) }}

httpHeaderAuth.name: AI Proposal - OpenAI API Key Header Auth

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ name: $('🔀 Merge AI + Form Data').first().json.companyName + ' - Proposal - ' + $('🔀 Merge AI + Form Data').first().json.proposalId }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ requests: Object.entries({client_name: $('🔀 Merge AI + Form Data').first().json.clientName, company_name: $('🔀 Merge AI + Form Data').first().json.companyName, proposal_id: $('🔀 Merge AI + Form Data').first().json.proposalId, date_created: $('🔀 Merge AI + Form Data').first().json.dateCreated, executive_summary: $('🔀 Merge AI + Form Data').first().json.executive_summary || '', why_choose_us: $('🔀 Merge AI + Form Data').first().json.why_choose_us || '', our_approach: $('🔀 Merge AI + Form Data').first().json.our_approach || '', scope_of_work: $('🔀 Merge AI + Form Data').first().json.scope_of_work || '', deliverables_timeline: $('🔀 Merge AI + Form Data').first().json.deliverables_timeline || '', budget: $('🔀 Merge AI + Form Data').first().json.budgetFormatted, total_investment: $('🔀 Merge AI + Form Data').first().json.totalFormatted, timeline: $('🔀 Merge AI + Form Data').first().json.timeline, expected_outcomes: $('🔀 Merge AI + Form Data').first().json.expected_outcomes || '', investment_justification: $('🔀 Merge AI + Form Data').first().json.investment_justification || '', competitive_positioning: $('🔀 Merge AI + Form Data').first().json.competitive_positioning || ''}).map(([k, v]) => ({ replaceAllText: { containsText: { text: '{{' + k + '}}', matchCase: true }, replaceText: String(v) } })) }) }}
={{ JSON.stringify({ name: $('🔀 Merge AI + Form Data').first().json.companyName + ' - Invoice - ' + $('🔀 Merge AI + Form Data').first().json.invoiceId }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ range: 'Sheet1!B1:B16', majorDimension: 'COLUMNS', values: [[ $('🔀 Merge AI + Form Data').first().json.invoiceId, $('🔀 Merge AI + Form Data').first().json.dateCreated, $('🔀 Merge AI + Form Data').first().json.dueDate, $('🔀 Merge AI + Form Data').first().json.clientName, $('🔀 Merge AI + Form Data').first().json.companyName, $('🔀 Merge AI + Form Data').first().json.clientEmail, $('🔀 Merge AI + Form Data').first().json.serviceType, $('🔀 Merge AI + Form Data').first().json.timeline, $('🔀 Merge AI + Form Data').first().json.budgetFormatted, $('🔀 Merge AI + Form Data').first().json.gstFormatted, $('🔀 Merge AI + Form Data').first().json.totalFormatted, 'Pending Payment', 'Bank Transfer / UPI / Stripe', $('🔀 Merge AI + Form Data').first().json.proposalId, 'Thank you for choosing us!', 'upi://pay?pa=YOUR_UPI@bank' ]] }) }}

parameters.subject: ={{ 'Just following up on your proposal — ' + ($json['Company Name'] || $json.companyName || '') }}
parameters.message:
=

Following up on your proposal

Hi {{ $json['Client Name'] || $json.clientName || 'there' }},

I wanted to follow up on the proposal we sent for {{ $json['Company Name'] || $json.companyName || '' }}. Have you had a chance to review it?

If you have any questions or would like to discuss anything, please reply to this email — I'd love to help.

✅ Accept Proposal ❌ Decline

Pure Remedy Solutions

parameters.url: ={{ 'https://sheets.googleapis.com/v4/spreadsheets/1MGgHx9Y80jJxjfs0MBdPLwL5QcSpvGctTOnuxG4nciU/values/CRM!L' + $('🔎 Find Row Day 3').first().json.row_number + ':M' + $('🔎 Find Row Day 3').first().json.row_number + '?valueInputOption=USER_ENTERED' }}

parameters.subject: ={{ 'Checking in again: ' + ($json['Company Name'] || $json.companyName || '') }}
parameters.message:
=

Checking in — {{ $json['Company Name'] || $json.companyName || '' }}

Hi {{ $json['Client Name'] || $json.clientName || 'there' }},

This is our second follow-up regarding the proposal for {{ $json['Company Name'] || $json.companyName || '' }}. We want to make sure you have everything you need to make a decision.

Please let us know if you'd like to adjust the scope, pricing, or timeline — we are flexible and happy to work with you.

✅ Accept Proposal ❌ Decline

Pure Remedy Solutions

parameters.url: ={{ 'https://sheets.googleapis.com/v4/spreadsheets/1MGgHx9Y80jJxjfs0MBdPLwL5QcSpvGctTOnuxG4nciU/values/CRM!L' + $('🔎 Find Row Day 7').first().json.row_number + ':M' + $('🔎 Find Row Day 7').first().json.row_number + '?valueInputOption=USER_ENTERED' }}

parameters.subject: ={{ 'Closing out your proposal file — ' + ($json['Company Name'] || $json.companyName || '') }}
parameters.message:
=

Closing your proposal file — {{ $json['Company Name'] || $json.companyName || '' }}

Hi {{ $json['Client Name'] || $json.clientName || 'there' }},

We have not heard back regarding the proposal for {{ $json['Company Name'] || $json.companyName || '' }}, so we are closing this file for now.

If you'd like to revisit this in future, please reach out anytime — we would be happy to reconnect and put together a fresh proposal.

Pure Remedy Solutions
